visa_types.name: Business Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport valid at least for 6       months.
- Photocopy of the first and last page of       the Passport having the details of the applicant.
- Duly filled Visa Form.
- 2 Passport size-colored photographs on       white background with 60% face size.
- Request letter from the applicant       specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail.
- Invitation letter from an Egypt-based       entity with full address and contact details of the host.
- ID copy of the Invitee.
- Confirmed return complete-route Air       ticket.
- Last 6 months personal bank statement of       the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Business Visa]

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)
Please Note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/Card/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The given fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
Above Visa Fee is inclusive of 'Embassy Processing Fee of INR500' per applicant.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time for Delhi location is minimum 10 to 12 working days.
Processing time for other location in India is minimum 12 to 15 working days.
Please Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Egypt, New Delhi.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for The Purpose of Business/Trade Exhibition/Training course.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for The Purpose of Business/Trade Exhibition/Training course.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business Visa]

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)
Please Note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/Card/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The given fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
Above Visa Fee is inclusive of 'Embassy Processing Fee of INR500' per applicant.

## Documents Required
- Original Passport valid at least for 6       months.
- Photocopy of the first and last page of       the Passport having the details of the applicant.
- Duly filled Visa Form.
- 2 Passport size-colored photographs on       white background with 60% face size.
- Request letter from the applicant       specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail.
- Invitation letter from an Egypt-based       entity with full address and contact details of the host.
- ID copy of the Invitee.
- Confirmed return complete-route Air       ticket.
- Last 6 months personal bank statement of       the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top       of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks       and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly       at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and       contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more       than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after       consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on       religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent       from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be       covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of       the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple       marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time for Delhi location is minimum 10 to 12 working days.
Processing time for other location in India is minimum 12 to 15 working days.
Please Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Egypt, New Delhi.

## Online Application Form
Application Form

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport valid at least for 6 months.
- Photocopy of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the applicant.
- Duly filled Visa Form.
- (2) Passport size colored photographs on white background with 60% face size.
- Request letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail.
- Detailed tour program (Travel Itinerary) with all contact details of the Egyptian Travel Agent on the letter head with the authorized signature and stamp of the Egyptian travel agent.
- Egypt Travel Agent National ID copy.
- Confirmed return complete-route Air ticket.
- Confirmed Hotel Booking/Accommodation Voucher.
- Last 6 months personal bank statement of the applicant  with original signature and stamp of the Bank.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Tourist]

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)
Please Note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/Card/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The given fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
Above Visa Fee is inclusive of 'Embassy Processing Fee of INR500' per applicant.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time for Delhi location is minimum 10 to 12 working days.
Processing time for other location in India is minimum 12 to 15 working days.
Please Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Egypt, New Delhi.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for tourism or other non-business-related purposes.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Visa Fees

- Confirmed Hotel Booking/Accommodation Voucher.
- Last 6 months personal bank statement of the applicant  with original signature and stamp of the Bank.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top       of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks       and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly       at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and       contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more       than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after       consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on       religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent       from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be       covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of       the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple       marks.

Processing time for Delhi location is minimum 10 to 12 working days.

visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original       Passport valid at least for 6 months.
- Photocopy       of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the       applicant.
- Duly       filled Visa Form.
- 2       Passport size colored photographs on white background with 60% face size.
- Request       letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with       passport detail.
- Invitation       letter from an Egypt-based entity with full address and contact details of       the host.
- Confirmed       Air Ticket.
- Visa  will be issued upon receiving the work permit from the Egyptian competent  authorities.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Work Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for work purpose.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Work Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for work purpose.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Work Visa]

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)
Please Note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/Card/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The given fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
Above Visa Fee is inclusive of 'Embassy Processing Fee of INR500' per applicant.

## Documents Required
- Original       Passport valid at least for 6 months.
- Photocopy       of the first and last page of the Passport having the details of the       applicant.
- Duly       filled Visa Form.
- 2       Passport size colored photographs on white background with 60% face size.
- Request       letter from the applicant specifying the purpose of visit along with       passport detail.
- Invitation       letter from an Egypt-based entity with full address and contact details of       the host.
- Confirmed       Air Ticket.
- Visa  will be issued upon receiving the work permit from the Egyptian competent  authorities.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top       of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks       and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly       at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and       contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more       than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after       consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on       religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be apparent       from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be       covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of       the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple       marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Processing time for Delhi location is minimum 10 to 12 working days.
Processing time for other location in India is minimum 12 to 15 working days.
Please Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of Egypt, New Delhi.

visa_types.name: Entry Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport valid at least for 6       months.
- Photocopy of the first and last page of       the Passport having the details of the applicant.
- Duly filled Visa Form.
- 2 Passport size colored photographs on       white background with 60% face size.
- Request letter from the applicant       specifying the purpose of visit along with passport detail.
- Invitation letter from an Egypt-based       host with proof of relationship with the invitee
- Residence permit for work of the host (if       foreigner) with at least 6 months validity.
- Confirmed return complete-route Air       ticket.
- Last 6 months personal bank statement of       the applicant with original signature and stamp of the Bank.

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)

- The given fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
Above Visa Fee is inclusive of 'Embassy Processing Fee of INR500' per applicant.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Entry Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for The Purpose of Joining Family / Attending a Conference/workshop/Internship/Festival
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Entry Visa is given to those visiting Egypt for The Purpose of Joining Family / Attending a Conference/workshop/Internship/Festival

## Visa Fees

[Table:Entry Visa]

VFS Logistic Fee for all locations – INR800 (inclusive of taxes)
Please Note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/Card/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.

The main characteristics of the face must be apparent       from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be       covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of       the face is apparent. Teeth should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
